journey.name: Enable Accessibility Permission
journey.description: Automates enabling the accessibility service for AndroidUseTrial.

actions.action: Tap the "Open Accessibility Settings" button. This should open the system Accessibility settings menu.
In the Accessibility settings, find and tap on "AndroidUseTrial". You might need to scroll down to find it under "Downloaded services" or "Installed apps".
Tap the toggle for "Use AndroidUseTrial" to enable it. If a system security warning or confirmation dialog appears, tap "Allow" or "OK".
Navigate back to the AndroidUseTrial app. Verify that the status text now says "Accessibility Service Enabled: true".
